title: The Princess Reveals Her Loneliness
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Zoro, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken. The core story beat is the princess reveals her loneliness.
scene: The scene centers on the princess reveals her loneliness, with King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Zoro, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshi!! We are on our way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look - the door is open!! What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why is there an axe?! Where did it come from?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshii!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you alright?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you hurt at all...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhh! What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We were so worried when we heard your plaintiff cries! Who on earth opened this door?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was there an intruder?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The next day, the government has

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let me goo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SHHH! be quiet...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I... I apologise for causing you alarm...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was nothing, really...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....I think...I must have had a bad dream, that is all...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I was sure I heard somebody else's voice...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: .. If that is the case... then I am most relieved.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, yes. There is something else that I should speak to you about...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It regards the pirate, straw hat luffy, who was responsible for saving Megalo. The situation has become rather complicated, you see...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm..?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The other part of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and as such...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: under suspicion of the kidnapping of the missing mermaids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and as a precaution against these possible future misdeeds...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the decision has been made to confine the entire straw hat crew to the Palace dungeons.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The swordsman, who arrived at the Palace ahead of the others, has already been apprehended.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The three further crew members who just arrived at the castle have most likely been appre- headed by now as well...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember remember

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only problem is... the captain of their crew, straw hat luffy, who was last seen entering the Palace along with those three crew members, seems to have gone missing...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Fear not; we will apprehended his other crewmates from their various locations across fishman Island and ensure the safety of our proud kingdom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It pains me greatly that we are forced to greet Megalo's Saviour with chains and cells rather than the planned celebrations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...ah... it would seem that five minutes have passed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In that case, we will be leaving!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I must thank you ever so much.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I apologise for the rudeness of the guards just now... Please forgive them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still, I never imagined that you were the one responsible for saving Megalo!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Your name... is Luffy-SAMA, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 44- huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And you are a pirate... does that mean you are a bad person?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Hm?...uhhh... I dunno. You can decide that yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah... but don't worry. They'll never be able to keep my friends captured for long!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyway, I really don't mind! So... what was that axe that flew in here just now?! What kind of crazy guy threw that thing, and from where?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I believe... I know the one responsible. It is a man named Vander Decken- same... He seems to have a grudge against me because I refused his proposals of marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From what I gather, he is cursed with a demonic power by the name of "Mato Mate"...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: It allows him to target me at any time, no matter where he may be... as such, I am never permitted to leave this shell tower, for it would be far too dangerous for me to be out in the open...!!

summary: The Princess Reveals Her Loneliness. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
